examples: Her husband had played the trombone in the band for a decade.
Every time I sing that line, I have to compete with that darn trombone!
Not bad considering what I did to that poor trombone!
The TROMBONE (also sometimes called SLIDE TROMBONE ) has remained largely unchanged for over five centuries.
"The thing with the trombone, actually, is the range is quite severe, " Mr. Muhly said.
